name: Daily Report via Telegram Bot
description: Collects daily information and sends via Telegram Bot API (no app interaction needed)

steps.goal: Open today's view. Use read_screen to collect all events for today. Copy calendar events to clipboard.
Open the app. Use read_screen to collect all notes. Copy notes to clipboard.

Use shell command to send collected information via Telegram Bot API. Format: 'Daily Report [date]' followed by calendar and notes. Command: curl -X POST 'https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage' -d 'chat_id=${TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}' -d 'text=<collected_info>'
